title: Tangy Egg Stir Fry
description: A simple and quick egg stir-fry with a tangy twist, made with tender egg whites and a hint of flavor.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 teaspoon of sesame oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Pour in the egg whites and scramble them until they are cooked through.
Add the tangy sauce to the eggs and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Transfer the egg mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped scallions, if desired.
